address: Jumeirah Rd | Burj Al-Arab Hotel, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
hotelDescription: The Burj Al Arab is a hotel located in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It is the third tallest hotel in the world; however, 39% of its total height is made up of non-occupiable space.[7][8][9] Burj Al Arab stands on an artificial island 280 m (920 ft) from Jumeirah beach and is connected to the mainland by a private curving bridge. The shape of the structure is designed to mimic the sail of a ship. It has a helipad near the roof at a height of 210 m (689 ft) above ground
fooddrinks: Refrigerator,Microwave,Cookware, dishware, and utensils,Free bottled water

hotelDescription: Jumeirah Beach Hotel is located directly at the Arabian shores. All rooms and suites feature seaview, the latest technology and free wireless internet. Guests receive unlimited complimentary access to Wild Wadi Waterpark and Sinbad's Kids Club. Talise Fitness with its tennis courts, watersports, gym, PADI dive centre, climbing wall and Spa offers a gregarious experience. Over 19 restaurants, bars and lounges are renowned for genuine, true hospitality.
services:
Jumeirah Beach Hotel is a hotel in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The hotel, which opened in 1997, is operated by the Dubai-based hotelier Jumeirah.[1] The hotel contains 598 rooms and suites, 19 beachfront villas, and 20 restaurants and bars.[4] This wave-shaped hotel complements the sail-shaped Burj Al Arab, which is adjacent to the Jumeirah Beach Hotel.
The hotel occupies a location on the beach. Visitors to the hotel have at total of 33,800 square metres (364,000 sq ft) of beach for their use.[3] Beside the hotel is the Wild Wadi Water Park. All guests in the hotel have unlimited access to the waterpark.

address: 13th Street, Sheikh Rashid Rd, Wafi city - Dubai
hotelDescription: Raffles Dubai is a 19-storey hotel that is built in the shape of a pyramid. The luxury hotel is located in Dubai, the most populous city in the United Arab Emirates The design was an inspiration taken from traditional Egyptian architecture. It is located at the Wafi City Development,[1] 15 minutes away from the Dubai International Airport.[2] The hotel features 252 rooms and suites, 6 restaurants, a spa, and a fitness center

hotelDescription: Sofitel is a French hotel chain under AccorHotels, which opened its first property in Strasbourg in 1964. Its first overseas opening (in Minneapolis, USA) was in 1974. In 1995, Sofitel had 100 hotels in 40 countries and employed 12,500 people. Two years later, Sofitel joined the Accor Group, founded in 1983 and in 2000, opened properties in Philadelphia and New York. In 2005, Sofitel continued its expansion with Sofitel Asia Pacific. In 2008, Sofitel became its own unit in the Accor group with 120 Hotels worldwide.

hotelName: Jumeirah Dar Al Masyaf at Madinat Jumeirah
address: Jumeirah Beach Road | Madinat Jumeirah Resort, Dubai 75157, United Arab Emirates
hotelDescription:
Set amongst tranquil gardens, waterways, exclusive pools and the resort’s private beach, the intimate and exquisite summerhouses of Jumeirah Dar Al Masyaf offers newly refurbished elegant and spacious guestrooms and courtyards, personalised and generous butler service and an understated Arabian luxury experience.
The summerhouses offer an exquisitely designed hideaway, large terraces overlooking the fresh seawater ways and high tech bedroom facilities. Jumeirah Dar Al Masyaf's luxurious guest rooms and suites are all located in Arabian-styled houses. All of the spacious rooms are decorated with furnishings of authentic Arabic style, and have luxury bathrooms.
Facilities of Jumeirah Dar Al Masyaf include a world class golf, Sinbad’s Kids Club, onsite Madinat Theatre, Madinat Jumeirah’s own private beach, watersports, tennis and luxury yachts.

hotelDescription: Grosvenor House and its two iconic 45-story towers, Tower One and Tower Two, redefine the world of luxury. hotelName: Movenpick Hotel Ibn Battuta Gate Dubai
address: Sheikh Zayed Road | Adjacent to Ibn Battuta Shopping Mall, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
hotelDescription:
One of our most-loved properties in Dubai! Featuring a rooftop pool, Mövenpick Hotel Ibn Battuta Gate offers modern rooms. Complimentary access to Private Beach Club on the Palm Jumeirah with complimentary shuttle service. It boasts 8 restaurants and bars including a nightclub. The restaurants reflect the journey of the great Arab explorer with tastes from around the world .
The spacious rooms feature a modern, Moroccan-inspired décor. Each comes with a flat-screen TV and a minibar. All rooms are en-suite with a bath tub and walk-in rainforest shower. Free WiFi available for guests.
Guests can work out in the gym, which includes aerobic equipment and free weights. Relaxing massage treatments and facials are offered at the Safar Spa.
Ibn Battuta Shopping Mall is located next to the hotel, Dubai Marina and Jebel Ali are a 5-minute drive away. Mall of the Emirates is a 10 minute drive. Dubai International Airport is a 35-minute drive while Al Maktoum International Airport is a 15 minute drive from Mövenpick Hotel Ibn Battuta Gate.

address: Crescent East, 10 | Palm Jumeirah, PO Box 24988, Dubai 24988, United Arab Emirates
hotelDescription:
Located on the world famous Palm Jumeirah, Waldorf Astoria Dubai Palm Jumeirah features luxury rooms and suites with panoramic views of the Arabian Gulf. This elegant beach resort offers a 200 m private beach, 2 temperature-controlled swimming pools, water sports activities, tennis courts, Kids Club and a Waldorf Astoria Spa. Guests can enjoy free WiFi acess in the whole property.
All spacious rooms are decorated with a contemporary design and features the signature Waldorf Astoria beds. The rooms offer a large balcony with stunning sea views of the Palm Jumeirah or the Dubai skyline. Each room has a comfortable seating area, workstation and a 42 inch flat-screen TV. The white marble bathrooms are fitted with a spacious bath with TV, a walk-in shower and luxury amenities.
Guests can choose from 6 restaurants and bars for a diverse dining experience with Arabic-inspired cuisine at Mezzerie, Southeast Asian flavours at LAO or fine-casual dining at Social by Michelin chef Heinz Beck. Palm Avenue restaurant and lounge features a terrace with private cabanas where cocktails and international dishes can be enjoyed. Serafina Bar offers a signature cocktail list and live entertainment in the evenings.
